title: A Baby Shower For Information As An Asset Class
text:
A Baby Shower For Information As An Asset Class

Didier Darcet

Gavekal-IS | 11 Jun 2026

Before year-end, a major event is expected to take place: the birth of one—possibly two—US futures contracts on computing power, listed on the Chicago Mercantile and the Intercontinental exchanges. The participants read like a who’s who of the digital world: artificial intelligence laboratories such as OpenAI and Anthropic, cloud giants like Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud and Microsoft Azure, data-center operators and financial institutions including BlackRock, with others certain to follow.The significance of this development extends far beyond the launch of a new derivative contract. Consider it the baby shower, not yet the birth, but certainly the celebration, of a new asset class. This brings us to the question: why does this event deserve such a celebration?
